hooks.command: bash -c "count=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if [ $count -gt 0 ]; then echo \"⚠️ $count uncommitted file(s). Consider committing.\"; fi"
bash -c "echo 'Self-check before stopping: Is the task actually complete? Did you verify your changes work? Any loose ends?'"
bash -c "echo 'Reminder: Context Check required. Did you cite an existing pattern? Have you read MEMORY.md this session? (Existing patterns / Modules / Memory / Upstream-downstream / Unsure)'"

bash -c "ts=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'); proj=$(basename \"$(pwd)\"); echo \"$ts | $proj | compact triggered\" >> ~/.claude/.compact-log; { echo \"# Pre-Compact Checkpoint ($ts)\"; echo \"## Working Directory\"; pwd; echo \"## Git Status\"; git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo \"## Recent Commits\"; git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null; } > ~/.claude/.compact-marker; echo '⚠️ Context is about to be compacted. If you have not written a session note, this is your last chance. Run /session now or at least record the current task state.'"
